Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned across all process variants containing this activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + Resolved in variants that include Completed + In Call after Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time of Accepted + Assigned when followed by Completed + In Call compared to when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Assigned and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned in variants that eventually lead to Completed + In Call versus variants that lead to Completed + Closed without Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Accepted + Assigned in process variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Cycle Time of Accepted + Assigned in cases where Completed + In Call appears later in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time it takes Accepted + Assigned to be done before the first occurrence of Completed + In Call in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Assigned in variants that contain both Accepted + Wait - User and Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + In Call grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time of Accepted + Assigned when directly followed by Accepted + In Progress in traces that later include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total resolution time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + Closed in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + In Call in high-impact cases (impact = 'High')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'
